title: Sul4ur's global resource pack
description: The one in all resource pack for all of my mods
body:
The one in all resource pack for my data packs!

Supported data packs:
| Resource pack Versions | Supported Data pack | Supported Data pack versions |
| -------- | ----------------------- | ------------------ |
| v1.0+    | [SGrave](https://modrinth.com/datapack/sgrave) | v1.0.3 \|\| v1.0.3.1 \|\| v-1d2 \|\| v-1d3 |
| v1.0+    | [Increased mob drops](https://modrinth.com/datapack/imd) | v1.1 \|\| v1.2 |
| v1.1+    | [Supplementary pearls](https://modrinth.com/datapack/supp_pearls) | v1.0 |
